offer: For property managers processing 5–15 lease renewals/month, inefficient tracking causes missed renewal opportunities. We automate report preparation instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient tracking of lease expirations and renewals
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar challenges
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try email reminders and dashboard for tracking
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding to first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing lease data
